flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Notre Dame of Maryland University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (59.1% → 50.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Notre Dame of Maryland University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (50.5% → 42.9%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Notre Dame of Maryland University are 2% above 6-year earnings ($63.9k → $65.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Notre Dame of Maryland University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
